creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Add a patch to fix CVE-2013-4248 [1], it was obtained from [2]. Bump security/php53-openssl PORTREVISION.

[1] http://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2013-4248

[2] http://git.php.net/?p=php-src.git;a=blobdiff;f=ext/openssl/openssl.c;h=c32748cb6443a4d8e4bb14fe96ad72e32ec8acff;hp=d7ac117e51c8f5d8ab0632c276af48d610b4b19e;hb=2874696a5a8d46639d261571f915c493cd875897;hpb=f4dc2240a048050a87a6e3e31573f13a2256cf2e

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
